# Beacon

Beacon is a durable web research agent with persistent cross-session memory.

Official URL: https://beacon-mu-murex.vercel.app/
Sitemap: https://beacon-mu-murex.vercel.app/sitemap.xml
Robots: https://beacon-mu-murex.vercel.app/robots.txt

## Product summary
- Runs recurring web research workflows.
- Uses memory to track what is new across runs.
- Delivers delta reports to Slack, GitHub, Discord, and the web dashboard.

## Public pages
- https://beacon-mu-murex.vercel.app/
- https://beacon-mu-murex.vercel.app/dashboard
- https://beacon-mu-murex.vercel.app/docs
- https://beacon-mu-murex.vercel.app/graph
- https://beacon-mu-murex.vercel.app/logs
- https://beacon-mu-murex.vercel.app/memory
- https://beacon-mu-murex.vercel.app/support
